utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan contains all five of these items. Each one includes details such as provider, specific policy identifiers, coverage descriptions, and cost breakdowns (monthly and annual). Therefore, every requested item appears in the final plan and is fully specified with all required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes multiple LifeFirst policies across health, property, travel, and additional services. We must match these LifeFirst items to their corresponding ratings in the ground-truth data. For health coverage, the plan lists 'LF-HEALTH-001' and 'LF-MENTAL-001', which correspond to the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health categories (each rated 8). For property coverage, the plan lists 'LF-PROP-001', which matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 8). For travel coverage, 'LF-TRAV-001' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under travel insurance (rating 7). For additional services, the plan includes 'LF-WELL-001' and 'LF-TELE-001', which correspond to 'Wellness Programs' (rating 9) and 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 9) respectively.
